articles.summary: The Trump administration will increase average Medicare Advantage payments by 2.48%, or more than $13 billion, in 2027.

articles.title: Trump administration sets up to 100% tariffs on some imported drugs, with many companies exempt
articles.summary: The Trump administration is preparing to impose new tariffs on drugmakers that have not struck deals with the president to lower their U.S. drug prices.

articles.title: Blue Owl caps private credit funds redemptions at 5% after steep request levels
articles.summary: Blue Owl attributed the higher-than-usual requests to "heightened market concerns around AI-related disruption to software companies."

articles.title: Regional sports networks are faltering even as ratings soar
articles.summary: A group of regional sports networks is set to wind down, marking the demise of a once-lucrative business that's faced significant pressure.

articles.title: Starbucks to award bonuses to baristas, expand tipping to promote turnaround efforts
articles.summary: Starbucks is in the middle of a turnaround focused on improving both the customer and employee experience.

articles.title: Family offices stall deal-making during Iran conflict
articles.summary: While global uncertainty has weighed on deal count, family offices and corporate investors are still piling into megadeals.

articles.title: Basic business class is here with new, stripped-down United Polaris fares
articles.summary: United is overhauling its fare classes, offering cheaper business class and premium economy fares that are more restrictive.

articles.title: The Chinese box office isn't the Hollywood kingmaker it used to be. Here's why
articles.summary: Shifting government content controls and postpandemic Hollywood trends have made China less of a player in the global box office landscape.

articles.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
articles.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.

articles.title: The cost to fly private is up as much as 20% with fuel prices soaring
articles.summary: Deep-pocketed travelers are less likely to get priced out as airfares rise, but they have to navigate unexpected fees related to the Iran war and rising fuel costs.

articles.title: United Airlines hikes checked bag fee by $10 as fuel prices continue to climb
articles.summary: United Airlines became the second U.S. carrier in a week to raise check bag fees as the industry grapples with a more than 80% jump in jet fuel costs.

articles.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
articles.summary: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.
